column10: From the Earth, a star looks like a small glowing dot in the sky. It is actually a huge ball of gas with heat and light in outer space, far far away from Earth. They have existed for billions of years. Our sun is a type of star, except it is a lot closer to us so we can feel its heat and light.

When your favorite singer wants to put their song on the radio, or put it out into the world, they need to record it! That is where the sound board helps. All of the musicians play their instruments, and artist can use a sound board to put all of the instruments together for you to listen to!

An astronaut is a person who travels off of planet Earth into space. An astronaut travels to space in a rocket. An astronaut is trained to work and live in space in a rocket or a space shuttle. An astronaut can stay in space for months to learn about space and conduct research. The word "astronaut" comes from Greek words meaning "star sailor." An astronaut eats special food in space that is dry and easy to store.

column10: A 3D printer is a device that can make objects in three dimensions. You can use your computer to draw something and then the 3D printer makes it come to life. Maybe you have a toy that you want to design that only exists in your mind. If you can draw it on a computer, maybe with the help of your mom or dad, then the 3D printer can turn it into a real object. Usually 3D printed things can't be too big. Usually smaller than your hand but sometimes they can be really big.

A bindi is a special little dot or sticker that people, especially in India, wear on their forehead, right between their eyebrows. They can come in many colors and shapes. A common form is red or black and circular. Bindis can mean many different things; they can be a sign of marriage, a religious symbol, or a fashion statement. People wear them to look pretty, celebrate special days, or just to show they are proud of their culture. (Source: Britannica)

column10: Hot chocolate is a warm, yummy drink made from chocolate melted into milk! It is sweet and cozy. This drink is perfect for chilly days. People have been making drinks from cocoa for a very long time. Long ago, people in Mesoamerica, more specifically Mexico, discovered that the seeds inside the cacao tree's fruit could be made into a special drink. Back then, it was more bitter and spicy, different than the sweet drink we are used to today! When explorers were introduced to the drink from Mexico, they brought it to Europe and people started adding sugar and warm milk! That's how we got the hot chocolate we know and love today.

column10: The common loon is a type of bird in North America and Europe. They spend a lot of time in the water like freshwater Lakes, and are excellent divers. They love to dive and search for fish, crabs, and mollusks to eat. They come from one of the oldest families of birds, dating back 70 million years. In Native American folklore, especially for the Ojibwe people in North America, the Loon is very important. According to their creation stories, the loon helped create the earth and the world we call home. They're known for their beautiful red eyes, and white and black feathers.

A pie is a baked treat in the shape of a circle. Pies usually have a flaky outside made of dough, which is called a crust. On the inside, there is a filling. The inside of the pie can be sweet, and filled with things like fruits, sweet potatoes, or nuts. The inside can also be salty, and can be filled with things like vegetables, cheese, or meat. The first pies were made in Egypt 8,000 years ago, and were filled with sweet honey. The Egyptians would bake their pies over a fire. Today, people usually cook pies in an oven.

A rainbow is a big, colorful curve in the sky that you might see after it rains. It shows up when sunlight shines through tiny drops of water in the air, which spread the light into many colors like red, orange, yellow, green, blue, and purple. People all around the world have been seeing rainbows for thousands of years, and many stories say they are magical bridges or signs of good luck!
